name: cbi_arizona_inrix
title: AZ I-17/I-10 INRIX TMC readings + TMC identification
license: public benchmark reference — no INRIX/RITIS endorsement implied

confidence_score.description: 30 = real-time probe; 10 = historical/reference fill — treat like imputation

cvalue.description: probe density indicator; low cvalue = thin evidence

quality.imputation_rule: confidence_score < 30 is reference fill, not measurement (loader filter: OPEN item SIM-R2)

ordering.convention: TMC_Identification road_order; TMC direction codes carry +/-/P/N internal links

caveats: speed-only: volume is SYNTHESIZED via inverse-S3 prior — flow_synthetic=True downstream; capacities are modeled, not counted
